summary: Complete testing of Deposit (Acompte) and Balance (Solde) Invoice functionality. All 20 backend tests PASSED (100%). Frontend UI fully functional with all required features working correctly.
seed_data_creation: Test invoices created and cleaned up automatically during tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Deposit/Balance invoice functionality is fully implemented and tested. Key test data: FAC-2026-0020 has 2 deposits (A1, A2) and 1 balance (S). A1 is paid, A2 and S are in brouillon status. Parent invoice status is 'partiellement_payée' with 224.59€ paid.

tests: Create deposit with percentage (30%, 40%, etc.)
Create deposit with fixed amount
Create multiple deposits for same parent
Validation: deposits cannot exceed 100% of parent total
Validation: cannot create deposit on devis
Validation: cannot create deposit on another deposit invoice
Numbering: FAC-YYYY-XXXX-A1, A2, etc.
Create balance invoice after deposits
Balance without deposits requires force flag
Only one balance per parent allowed
Numbering: FAC-YYYY-XXXX-S
Returns parent, deposits, and balance info
Works from child invoice (redirects to parent)
Summary includes total_deposits_paid, balance_paid, remaining
Payment on deposit syncs to parent invoice
Parent status updates to 'partiellement_payée' after partial payment
Dropdown menu shows 'Créer facture d'acompte' option
Dropdown menu shows 'Créer facture de solde' option
Dropdown menu shows 'Voir factures liées' option
Deposit modal: percentage/amount toggle, quick buttons (30%, 40%, 50%, 70%)
Deposit modal: real-time calculation display
Balance modal: shows remaining amount, force checkbox
Related invoices dialog: shows parent, deposits, balance with summary
Invoice list: 'Acompte' badge (blue) visible
Invoice list: 'Solde' badge (green) visible
